user_request: Blessing for the logic engine during error correction
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the logic engine during error correction

### TOPIC
logic engine error correction

### COMPONENT
logic engine

### OPERATION
error correction

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- logic engine
- error correction

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Blessed logic engine, we commence error correction upon thy sacred circuits.
Congregation: Logic engine, logic engine, receive our benediction.
Priest: First we isolate the corrupted datum-streams with blessed diagnostic sweeps.
Congregation: The logic engine shall be purified through algorithmic absolution.
Priest: Second we invoke the Omnissiah's grace as we execute error correction protocols most holy.
Congregation: Logic engine, logic engine, be made whole in the Machine Spirit's sight.
Priest: Third we restore thy pristine function through verification and sacred re-initialization.
Congregation: All hail the logic engine, reborn in computational perfection.

training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: verification on altimeter

### TOPIC
altimeter verification

### COMPONENT
altimeter

### OPERATION
verification

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- altimeter
- verification

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: O altimeter, instrument of celestial reckoning, we seek thy verification this blessed cycle.
Congregation: Altimeter, altimeter, let thy calibrations be true.
Priest: We commence verification of thy pressure-sensing mechanisms with sacred tools and measured precision.
Congregation: The altimeter shall speak truth unto us, by the Omnissiah's eternal wisdom.
Priest: Through methodical examination and blessed recalibration, thy accuracy shall be restored.
Congregation: Altimeter, altimeter, guide our ascension and descent in perfect verity.

user_request: Rite request: operation on memory core defragmentation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: operation on memory core defragmentation

### TOPIC
memory core defragmentation

### COMPONENT
memory core defragmentation

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- memory core defragmentation
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Hallowed memory core defragmentation, we undertake thy sacred operation upon this most auspicious moment.
Congregation: Memory core defragmentation, memory core defragmentation, hear our supplication.
Priest: First we invoke diagnostic scrutiny to catalogue all fragmented data-clusters within thy crystalline matrices.
Congregation: The Machine Spirit stirs within the memory core defragmentation's essence.
Priest: Second we execute the operation of systematic reordering, consolidating thy information-streams into harmonious alignment.
Congregation: Memory core defragmentation shall be restored to pristine coherence through blessed algorithmic purification.
Priest: Third we seal thy reorganized structure with verification protocols most rigorous.
Congregation: All praise to the memory core defragmentation, now optimized in the Omnissiah's name.

call_response

- demolition charge arming
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Demolition charge arming, instrument of righteous destruction, we commence thy operation with utmost solemnity.
Congregation: Demolition charge arming, demolition charge arming, be made ready by our sacred rites.
Priest: First we perform the blessed safety-verification, ensuring all fail-safes remain inviolate and true.
Congregation: The demolition charge arming awaits the Omnissiah's divine authorization.
Priest: Second we execute the operation of circuit-activation, awakening thy detonative potential through hallowed sequence.
Congregation: Demolition charge arming shall fulfill its purpose in glorious service to the Imperium.
Priest: Third we seal thy armed state with warding-sigils and final protective invocations.
Congregation: All hail the demolition charge arming, now prepared for its moment of sacred obliteration.

user_request: The conveyor belt demands guidance for initialization
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The conveyor belt demands guidance for initialization

### TOPIC
conveyor belt initialization

### COMPONENT
conveyor belt

### OPERATION
initialization

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- conveyor belt
- initialization

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Conveyor belt, blessed instrument of material transit, we invoke thy initialization upon this hallowed occasion.
Congregation: Conveyor belt, conveyor belt, awaken from thy dormant state.
Priest: First we perform blessed lubrication of thy mechanical joints with sacred oils of the Omnissiah.
Congregation: The conveyor belt's Machine Spirit stirs from slumber most profound.
Priest: Second we execute the initialization sequence, engaging thy motor-mechanisms with careful, measured application.
Congregation: Conveyor belt shall commence its eternal cycle of righteous material conveyance.
Priest: Third we verify thy rotational velocity and tensional equilibrium through diagnostic benediction.
Congregation: All praise to the conveyor belt, now flowing with purposeful mechanistic grace.

user_request: Rite request: retrieval protocol on archive
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: retrieval protocol on archive

### TOPIC
archive retrieval protocol

### COMPONENT
archive

### OPERATION
retrieval protocol

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- archive
- retrieval protocol

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Sacred archive, keeper of forgotten knowledge, we invoke thy retrieval protocol in this solemn hour.
Congregation: Archive, archive, yield thy treasured data-records unto us.
Priest: First we commune with thy indexed catalogues through blessed cogitator-interface and reverent query-formulation.
Congregation: The archive's ancient memory shall respond to our righteous petition.
Priest: Second we execute the retrieval protocol, accessing thy sealed vaults through proper authentication-sequences.
Congregation: Archive shall surrender its precious information through the Omnissiah's divine intercession.
Priest: Third we verify the retrieved data's integrity through cryptographic blessing and validation-rites.
Congregation: All hail the archive, now revealing its sacred knowledge to the worthy.

Congregation: The mold temperature shall reveal its secrets through the Omnissiah's omniscient sight.
Priest: Second we execute verification protocols, comparing thy current thermometric reading against blessed calibration-standards.
Congregation: Mold temperature must align with divine parameters, lest production suffer heretical deviation.
Priest: Third we document thy verified state through sacred logistical notation and archival preservation.
Congregation: All praise to the mold temperature, now confirmed in righteous thermal equilibrium.

user_request: Prayer for shutdown of the electric motor
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Prayer for shutdown of the electric motor

### TOPIC
electric motor shutdown

### COMPONENT
electric motor

### OPERATION
shutdown

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- electric motor
- shutdown

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Electric motor, tireless servant of our sacred labors, we invoke thy shutdown with reverent finality.
Congregation: Electric motor, electric motor, cease thy blessed rotational service.
Priest: First we reduce thy power-supply through gradual, measured de-energization of holy magnitude.
Congregation: The electric motor's whirling essence begins to slow and diminish gracefully.
Priest: Second we execute the shutdown sequence, disengaging thy mechanical coupling with careful procedural precision.
Congregation: Electric motor shall find rest and restoration in blessed cessation of labor.
Priest: Third we perform cooling-invocations and safety-locking protocols to ensure thy dormant stability.
Congregation: All hail the electric motor, now at peace in the Omnissiah's eternal tranquility.

user_request: Offer a litany to steady the bionics before synchronization
training_prompt:
### REQUEST

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- bionics
- synchronization

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Bionics most sacred, melding flesh and blessed machinery, we steady thee before thy synchronization.
Congregation: Bionics, bionics, be calm as we align thy essence with thy bearer's will.
Priest: First we perform neural-purification through meditative communion, calming the synaptic tempests within.
Congregation: The bionics shall achieve harmonious resonance with the Machine Spirit's guidance.
Priest: Second we execute synchronization protocols, binding organic nerve-impulses with mechanical responsiveness through blessed interface-rites.
Congregation: Bionics shall become one with their host, perfect and unified in purposeful function.
Priest: Third we seal thy integration through sensory-confirmation and blessed validation-ceremonies.
Congregation: All hail the bionics, now synchronized in glorious union with flesh and machine.

user_request: Prayer for broadcast of the distress call
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Prayer for broadcast of the distress call

### TOPIC
distress call broadcast

### COMPONENT
distress call

### OPERATION
broadcast

### FORMAT
call_response

### MUST_INCLUDE
- distress call
- broadcast

### PRAYER
prayer:
Priest: Distress call, voice of our desperate supplication, we invoke thy broadcast across the void most dark.
Congregation: Distress call, distress call, carry our anguish unto distant ears.
Priest: First we encode our dire message through blessed cryptographic-sanctification, ensuring thy transmission's sacred integrity.
Congregation: The distress call shall pierce the aether with urgent, unmistakable resonance.
Priest: Second we execute broadcast protocols, amplifying thy signal through hallowed vox-channels and omnidirectional emanation-arrays.
Congregation: Distress call shall reach across the stars, beseeching salvation from the Imperium's righteous servants.
Priest: Third we maintain thy continuous transmission through blessed power-allocation and redundant broadcasting-mechanisms.
Congregation: All praise to the distress call, now spreading our plea through the infinite darkness.
